name: blackbox
tagline: Delegates coding tasks to the Blackbox AI multi-model CLI agent: install, configure, run one-shot/background/interactive/parallel jobs.
verdict: Concrete, well-exampled delegation guide with sensible failure handling (prerequisite checks, session monitoring, kill-if-stuck). Gaps: the CLI install is unpinned, the PR-review flow silently depends on `gh` without declaring it, the final-report contract is left to 'summarize for the user' with no shape, there's no scope-exclusion guidance, and the.

highlights.summary: `npm install -g @blackboxai/cli` (line 23) is unpinned — installs whatever npm currently resolves as latest.
description (line 3) states the function (delegate coding tasks) but has no explicit 'use when'/trigger phrasing.
No 'NOT for' or exclusion guidance anywhere despite a general-purpose coding-delegation scope overlapping other agent CLIs.
